mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_ideology_achievements(id, user_id, course_id, v_id, classroom_id, value_count, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{userId}, #{courseId}, #{vId}, #{classroomId}, #{vCount}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO classroom_ideology_achievements(id, course_id, v_id, classroom_id, value_count,created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{courseId}, #{vId}, #{classroomId}, #{vCount}, NOW(), NOW())

INSERT INTO paper_ideology_achievement(id, paper_id, classroom_id,course_id, v_id,lib_id, value_count,paper_type, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{paperId}, #{classroomId},#{courseId}, #{vId},#{questionId}, #{vCount}, #{paperType},NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, paper_id AS paperId, classroom_id AS classroomId, test_id AS testId, course_name AS courseName, classroom_name AS classroomName, paper_name AS paperName, test_name AS testName, catelog, creator, create_time AS createTime, `row` FROM ideology_calculate_paper WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, course_id AS courseId, v_id AS vId, classroom_id AS classroomId, value_count AS valueCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM student_ideology_achievements WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, course_id AS courseId, v_id AS vId, classroom_id AS classroomId, value_count AS valueCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM classroom_ideology_achievements WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, course_id AS courseId, v_id AS vId, classroom_id AS classroomId, value_count AS valueCount, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM student_ideology_achievements WHERE classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT a.userId AS userId, b.stuno AS stuno, c.username AS studentName FROM cm_classroom_student a JOIN sm_student b ON a.userId = b.usersid JOIN st_users c ON c.id = a.userId WHERE a.classroomId = #{classroomId} AND a.ideology_state = 1
SELECT libId FROM pm_testpaper_questions WHERE paperId = #{paperId}

SELECT DISTINCT a.paper_id AS paperId, a.paper_type AS paperType, b.paper_name AS paperName FROM paper_ideology_achievement a JOIN ideology_calculate_paper b ON a.paper_id = b.paper_id WHERE a.paper_id = #{paperId} AND a.classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT a.lib_id AS questionId, b.content AS questionContent, b.title AS questionTitle, a.value_count AS valueCount, a.v_id AS valueId, c.valueTypeId AS valueTypeId, c.valueTypeName AS valueTypeName, c.valueName AS valueName FROM paper_ideology_achievement a LEFT JOIN tm_testquelib b ON a.lib_id = b.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.vname AS valueName, b.id AS valueId,a.id AS valueTypeId, a.vname AS valueTypeName FROM v_ideology_value a JOIN v_ideology_value b ON b.parent_id = a.id) AS c ON c.valueId = a.v_id WHERE a.paper_type = 'def' AND a.paper_id = #{paperId} AND a.classroom_id = #{classroomId}

SELECT a.lib_id AS questionId, b.itemName AS questionContent, b.itemName AS questionTitle, a.value_count AS valueCount, a.v_id AS valueId, c.valueTypeId AS valueTypeId, c.valueTypeName AS valueTypeName, c.valueName AS valueName FROM paper_ideology_achievement a LEFT JOIN pm_practice_item b ON a.lib_id = b.id LEFT JOIN (SELECT b.vname AS valueName, b.id AS valueId,a.id AS valueTypeId, a.vname AS valueTypeName FROM v_ideology_value a JOIN v_ideology_value b ON b.parent_id = a.id) AS c ON c.valueId = a.v_id WHERE a.paper_type = 'practice' AND a.paper_id = #{paperId} AND a.classroom_id = #{classroomId}
